infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to show your position on the map and track your hunting routes.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We need your location to track your hunting routes even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: We need your location to track your hunting routes even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need camera access to take photos of your fox hunts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need photo library access to select photos for your fox hunts.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Jotihunt to use your location to track your hunting routes.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Jotihunt to access your photos to submit fox hunts.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Jotihunt to use your camera to take photos of fox hunts.
Allow Jotihunt to use your camera to take photos of fox hunts.

notes.googleMapsApiKey: TODO: Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY_HERE with your actual Google Maps API key from https://console.cloud.google.com/
notes.easProjectId: TODO: Replace your-eas-project-id-here with your EAS project ID after running 'eas init'
